channel.title: Game Changer
channel.description: Latest releases from Game Changer on Dropout.tv

item.title: Rulette
item.description:
Oscar, Anna, and Jeremy must follow the rules they spin from the wheel.

Duration: 46:49

Tags: Game Changer, sam reich, rules, challenges, game shows, competitions, improv, surprises, not like the other, mad skills, unscripted, oscar montoya, anna garcia, jeremy culhane, ash kron, nico romero, paul robalino

item.title: Behind the Scenes of "One and Done"
item.description:
A behind the scenes look at Game Changer's "One and Done."

Duration: 14:02

Tags: Game Changer, sam reich, rules, challenges, game shows, competitions, improv, surprises, not like the other, mad skills, unscripted, paul robalino, ash kron, nico romero, ryan creamer, kevin stiller, sam geer, jazzy collins, chloe badner, behind the scenes

item.title: One and Done
item.description:
Zach, Ele, and Demi have only one shot to get it right.

Duration: 41:44

Tags: Game Changer, sam reich, rules, challenges, game shows, competitions, improv, surprises, not like the other, mad skills, unscripted, zach reino, ele woods, demi adejuyigbe, ash kron, nico romero, tao yang, katie marovitch, alex horne, geoff ross, justin cyrul
